name: PER_LDAP_USERS
description: Table for storing one record for each user to be processed in OIM when creating new users or maintaining user details (including username and preferred language)

columns.Name: LDAP_USER_ID
columns.Comments: Mandatory primary key updatable while new key generation

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LDAP_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to LDAP request. Mandatory. Updatable while new mandatory FK association.

columns.Name: REQUEST_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of request to perform: CREATE, UPDATE, SUSPEND, ACTIVATE

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the user portion of the request: REQUEST, IN PROGRESS, COMPLETE

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: The user Guid of the user the request is for (if available)

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: The username of the user the request is for (if not auto generated)

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_USER_GUID
columns.Comments: The user Guid of the user who is making the LDAP request (if available)

columns.Name: PREFERRED_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: The preferred language of the user the request is for. Default taken if not provided.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEND_CREDENTIALS_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether credential emails will be sent for the user

columns.Name: CREDENTIALS_EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Set this column If you want to send the credentials email to another email address

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_ID
columns.Comments: EXTERNAL_ID

columns.Name: ATOMPUB_ID
columns.Comments: ATOMPUB_ID

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: LAST_NAME

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: FIRST_NAME

columns.Name: EMAIL
columns.Comments: EMAIL

columns.Name: COMMONNAME
columns.Comments: COMMONNAME

columns.Name: USER_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: USER_CATEGORY

columns.Name: TWO_FACTOR_AUTH
columns.Comments: TWO_FACTOR_AUTH

columns.Name: MFA_PHONE
columns.Comments: MFA_PHONE
